title: The world's most innovative countries
summary_en: The Economist’s 2025 Innovation Index blends 72 indicators—R&D spending, patent quality, venture-capital depth, STEM graduates, regulatory agility and green-tech output—to rank 82 economies. Switzerland retains the top spot for the fifth year, followed by South Korea and the U.S. The big movers are Estonia (jumping 8 places to 14) and India (breaking into the top 20 for the first time), driven by digital-public-infrastructure and frugal-engineering models. China slips to 18 as high-tech exports plateau, yet still leads in absolute patent volume. The report warns that global innovation growth has slowed to its lowest rate since 2009, citing geopolitical fragmentation and falling research collaboration.
summary_zh: 《经济学人》2025 创新指数综合 72 项指标——研发支出、专利质量、风投深度、STEM 毕业生、监管敏捷度与绿色科技产出——对 82 个经济体进行排名。瑞士连续第五年蝉联榜首，韩国与美国分列二三。排名上升最快的是爱沙尼亚（跃升 8 位至第 14）和首次跻身前 20 的印度，二者得益于数字公共基础设施与“节俭式工程”模式。中国因高科技出口停滞下滑至第 18，但仍以绝对专利数量领先。报告指出，受地缘割裂与科研合作减少影响，全球创新增速已跌至 2009 年以来最低。
best_quote_en: Innovation is no longer a race of who spends the most, but of who connects ideas the fastest.
best_quote_zh: 创新不再是谁砸钱最多，而是谁最快把点子连接起来的竞赛。

title: Teach Students How to Think, Not What to Think
title_zh: 教学生如何思考，而非思考什么
summary_en: The Atlantic essay argues that K-12 and college curricula have become too focused on delivering ‘correct’ opinions rather than cultivating the cognitive tools students need to evaluate evidence, detect bias and revise beliefs. Drawing on recent studies in cognitive science, the piece shows that explicit instruction in metacognition, argument mapping and intellectual humility raises retention, reduces polarization and closes SES achievement gaps better than content-heavy lectures. It profiles schools that replaced debate clubs with ‘argument clinics’ where students must argue the opposite of their own view, and math classes where students spend 50% of time explaining why a formula might be wrong. The author warns that AI-generated essays and chatbot answers make it urgent to shift assessment from ‘right answer’ to ‘sound reasoning’, or risk graduating students who sound informed but cannot think.
summary_zh: 文章指出，从基础教育到大学，课程越来越偏重灌输“正确”观点，而非培养学生评估证据、识别偏见与修正立场的认知工具。借助最新认知科学研究，作者证明：显性教授元认知、论证图谱与智力谦逊，比内容密集型讲座更能提升记忆、缓和极化并缩小学业差距。文中介绍了把辩论社改为“论证诊所”的学校——学生必须为自己反对的立场辩护；以及把一半数学课时用于“找公式漏洞”的课堂。作者警告，AI 生成作文与聊天机器人答案正使“标准答案”式评估失效，若不转向“合理推理”评价，我们将培养出听起来博学却不会思考的一代。
best_quote_en: When students learn to doubt well, they also learn to believe better.
best_quote_zh: 当学生学会合理怀疑，他们才学会更好地相信。

title: The Great Student Swap
summary_en: The New Yorker chronicles a bold 2025 pilot that moved 30,000 fifth- and ninth-graders across 14 U.S. states for a full academic year, pairing high-poverty urban districts with affluent suburban ones. Funded by a bipartisan federal grant and private philanthropy, the ‘Great Student Swap’ aimed to test whether physically integrating classrooms still moves the needle on achievement and empathy when virtual learning is ubiquitous. Early findings: guest students gained 0.18 SD in math and 0.12 SD in reading, while host students showed no score decline but reported higher ‘perspective-taking’ scores on SEL surveys. Yet political backlash was swift—three state school boards have already voted to pull out, citing bussing trauma narratives and TikTok clips of awkward culture-clash moments. The piece frames the experiment as the latest chapter in America’s unfinished desegregation saga, asking if data can overcome nostalgia for neighborhood schools.
summary_zh: 《纽约客》记录了 2025 年一项激进试点：来自 14 个州的 3 万名五、九年级学生整学年互换，把高贫困城区与富裕郊区配对。由两党联邦拨款与私人基金会资助的“大规模学生交换”旨在验证，在虚拟学习普及的年代，实体混合课堂是否仍能提升成绩与同理心。初步数据显示，交换生数学提高 0.18 标准差、阅读提高 0.12 标准差；宿主学生成绩未降，社交情感问卷的“观点采择”得分却上升。然而政治反弹迅速——三个州教委已投票退出，理由包括“强制校车”创伤叙事与 TikTok 上文化冲突的尴尬视频。文章把这一试验置于美国未完成的消除种族隔离长河中，追问数据能否战胜对“社区学校”的怀旧。
best_quote_en: Integration is not a relic of the 1970s—it’s an app we still haven’t installed on the 21st-century classroom.
best_quote_zh: 融合不是 70 年代的遗物，而是 21 世纪课堂还没安装的一款应用。

title: McKinsey Technology Trends Outlook 2025
summary_en: The article 'McKinsey Technology Trends Outlook 2025' discusses 13 frontier technology trends that are poised to reshape global business. The report highlights how fast-moving innovations are driving significant shifts in the global technology landscape, increasing demand for computing power and accelerating experimentation. It identifies new trends like agentic AI and application-specific semiconductors, and notes that some technologies, particularly AI, are scaling rapidly, while others like quantum technologies require further advancements. The report also highlights overarching themes, including the rise of autonomous systems, new human-machine collaboration models, and challenges related to scaling, regional competition, and responsible innovation.
summary_zh: 这篇名为《麦肯锡2025技术趋势展望》的文章探讨了13个有望重塑全球商业的前沿技术趋势。报告强调了快速发展的创新如何推动全球技术格局发生重大转变，增加了对计算能力的需求并加速了实验。它识别了诸如代理式人工智能和应用特定半导体等新趋势，并指出某些技术，尤其是人工智能，正在迅速规模化，而量子技术等其他技术则需要进一步发展。报告还指出了贯穿这些趋势的总体主题，包括自主系统的兴起、新的人机协作模式以及与规模化、区域竞争和负责任创新相关的挑战。
best_quote_en: Artificial intelligence stands out not only as a powerful technology wave on its own but also as a foundational amplifier of the other trends. Its impact increasingly occurs via a combination with other trends, as AI both accelerates progress within individual domains and unlocks new possibilities at the intersections—accelerating the training of robots, advancing scientific discoveries in bioengineering, optimizing energy systems, and much more.
best_quote_zh: 人工智能不仅本身是一股强大的技术浪潮，也是其他趋势的基础放大器。它的影响越来越多地通过与其他趋势的结合而产生，因为人工智能既能加速各个领域的进步，又能在交叉领域开启新的可能性——加速机器人训练、推进生物工程领域的科学发现、优化能源系统等等。

title: How open source AI solutions are reshaping business
title_zh: 开源人工智能解决方案如何重塑商业
summary_en: Based on a survey of over 700 technology leaders and developers, this McKinsey article explores the growing adoption of open-source AI solutions. It highlights that businesses are increasingly using open-source AI for its high performance, ease of use, and lower costs compared to proprietary tools. The research indicates that organizations prioritizing AI for competitive advantage are more likely to leverage open-source solutions. While challenges like security are noted, the majority of respondents anticipate increasing their use of open-source AI in the coming years, suggesting a future where both open-source and proprietary technologies co-exist.
summary_zh: 基于对700多名技术领袖和开发者的调查，这篇麦肯锡文章探讨了开源人工智能解决方案日益增长的采用情况。文章强调，与专有工具相比，企业正在越来越多地使用开源人工智能，因为它具有高性能、易用性和更低的成本。研究表明，将人工智能作为竞争优势重点的企业更有可能利用开源解决方案。尽管文章也提到了安全等挑战，但大多数受访者预计未来几年会增加对开源人工智能的使用，这预示着一个开源和专有技术共存的未来。
best_quote_en: Our research shows that enterprises are using open source models more than one might expect.
best_quote_zh: 我们的研究表明，企业使用开源模型的程度超出了人们的预期。

title: What Kids Think About AI in Schools
title_zh: 孩子们怎么看校园里的 AI
summary_en: WIRED surveyed 1,000 U.S. students aged 13-18 to discover how they actually use generative AI in school, what they think teachers should know, and where they draw ethical lines. Contrary to adult assumptions, most teens are not ‘cheating machines’: they distinguish between using AI to brainstorm versus ghost-writing, overwhelmingly want clear rules, and fear punitive bans will only push usage underground. Their top request is for schools to teach ‘AI literacy’—how prompts work, why bias creeps in, and how to cite chatbots—rather than block them. The piece argues that student voices must be central to district AI policy if educators want norms that stick.
summary_zh: 《连线》对 1,000 名 13-18 岁美国学生进行调研，揭示他们如何在校园实际使用生成式 AI、希望老师了解什么，以及他们在哪里划出伦理红线。与成人预设相反，多数青少年并非“作弊机器”：他们能区分用 AI 头脑代写，强烈呼吁明确规则，并担心一味禁止只会把使用逼入地下。他们最渴望的是学校教授“AI 素养”——提示词原理、偏见来源、如何引用聊天机器人——而非简单封禁。文章指出，若想让规范真正落地，学生的声音必须成为学区 AI 政策的核心。
best_quote_en: If adults don’t let us talk about AI at school, we’ll still use it—just without any of the adults knowing, and that’s when the real problems start.
best_quote_zh: 如果大人不让我们在学校讨论 AI，我们照样会用——只是不让任何大人知道，那才是真正出问题的时候。

title: 6 expert strategies to find missing objects
title_zh: 寻找遗失物品的6个专家策略
summary_en: NPR’s Life Kit compiles six evidence-based methods from visual search scientists, a metal-detecting enthusiast, and a detective to help you find lost items. Key tactics include focusing on distinguishing features, reasoning through likely loss scenarios, recreating the object’s trajectory, changing perspectives, checking low-probability spots, and conducting a systematic grid search. Persistence and tenacity are emphasized, illustrated by the author’s passport found wedged beside a mattress.
summary_zh: NPR Life Kit 汇集视觉搜索科学家、金属探测爱好者与侦探的经验，提出6种行之有效的找物策略：锁定物品的显著特征、基于情境推理可能丢失路径、复现场景与物品轨迹、改变观察视角、刻意搜寻低概率位置、以及采用网格式系统搜索。文章强调坚持与韧性的重要性，并以作者在床垫与床沿间找回护照为例加以说明。
best_quote_en: “Imagine your search environment as a grid. Cover each square in the grid, maybe top to bottom, left to right.”
best_quote_zh: “把你的搜索环境想象成网格。逐格覆盖，或自上而下、由左至右地搜索。”

title: Written in the Stars: How Old is China?
title_zh: 写在星辰中：中国有多古老？
summary_en: The article discusses the 18th-century European scholarly debate on the age of Chinese civilization. While some scholars were skeptical, many others believed China to be the world's most ancient civilization, a belief supported by evidence from Chinese astronomers and European Jesuits. The article traces this historical debate and the early attempts to establish the historical origins of China.
summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了18世纪欧洲学者关于中华文明年代的学术辩论。虽然有些学者对此持怀疑态度，但许多人，在与中国天文学家合作的欧洲耶稣会士所提供的证据支持下，相信中国是世界上最古老的文明。该文章追溯了这场历史性的辩论以及早期为确立中国历史起源所做的尝试。
best_quote_en: Assertions of such great antiquity, Costard insisted, were surely 'fictitious and without Foundation'.
best_quote_zh: 科斯塔德坚称，如此古老的说法，无疑是“虚构且毫无根据的”。

title: Businesses Underinvesting in Climate Adaptation Despite Intensifying Hazards: Marsh
title_zh: 尽管灾害加剧，企业在气候适应方面的投资仍然不足：Marsh
summary_en: A 2025 survey by insurance broker Marsh reveals that businesses are not adequately investing in climate adaptation, despite facing escalating climate-related risks. The report, which surveyed 700+ companies, found that while many assess future impacts, 40% consider their current funding insufficient. Key challenges cited include other business priorities, a lack of knowledge, and limited resources. The article notes that 78% of organizations experience climate impacts, with 74% reporting asset losses, yet only 38% perform detailed risk assessments. Responsibility for adaptation is often seen as a sustainability issue rather than a core risk management function. The top concerns are flooding, heat stress, and water stress.
summary_zh: 保险经纪人Marsh在2025年进行的一项调查显示，尽管面临日益严重的气候相关风险，企业在气候适应方面的投资仍然不足。该报告调查了700多家公司，发现尽管许多公司正在评估未来的影响，但有40%的公司认为其目前用于气候适应的资金不足。文章中提到的主要挑战包括其他业务优先事项、缺乏相关知识和资源有限。文章指出，78%的组织受到气候影响，74%报告了资产损失，但只有38%进行了详细的气候风险评估。气候适应的责任通常被视为一个可持续性问题，而非核心风险管理职能。最受关注的风险是洪水、热应力和缺水。
best_quote_en: Our research shows organizations consistently underinvest in climate adaptation relative to the severity of their identified risks. There is clearly an urgent need for organizations to adopt a holistic approach to climate risk, integrating asset-level and system-level assessments, and embedding climate adaptation into enterprise risk management frameworks.
best_quote_zh: 我们的研究显示，相对于其已识别风险的严重性，组织在气候适应方面的投资持续不足。显然，组织迫切需要采取全面的气候风险方法，整合资产层面和系统层面的评估，并将气候适应纳入企业风险管理框架。

title: Written in the Stars: How Old is China?
title_zh: 辉哥的天空 - 台湾百岳登山资讯
summary_en: This article provides a detailed guide to the 'Taiwan Hundred Peaks,' a list of 100 mountains established in 1971 by four prominent mountaineers to promote hiking in Taiwan. It explains the criteria for selecting the peaks, which are known for their scenic, steep, unique, and rugged qualities. The article also introduces the mountaineering classification system (A, B, C, C+, D, E) used for hiking routes and includes a comprehensive table listing all 100 peaks with details like altitude and location. The author also shares personal achievements in mountaineering.
summary_zh: 本文详细介绍了“台湾百岳”，这是1971年由四位著名登山家为了推广台湾登山运动而制定的一百座山峰名单。文章解释了选择这些山峰的标准，它们以其秀丽、险峻、奇特和崎岖的特点而闻名。文章还介绍了国家公园管理处设立的登山路线分级系统（A、B、C、C+、D、E），并附带了一个详尽的表格，列出了所有100座山峰的海拔和位置等详细信息。作者还分享了其个人的登山成就。
best_quote_en: After the great mountaineer Lin Wen-an completed the Central Mountain Range traverse in 1971, he and three fellow mountaineers—Ding Tong-san, Cai Jing-zhang, and Xing Tian-zheng—after several explorations, research, and consultations, designated 100 peaks that were scenic, steep, rugged, and unique, had proper names, and had significant elevation changes as the 'Taiwan Hundred Peaks' to promote the sport of mountaineering in Taiwan.
best_quote_zh: 岳界大老林文安先生於1971年中央山脈大縱走後，與丁同三、蔡景璋、邢天正等三位登山同好數度探勘、研究、磋商後，將其中具有秀、峻、險、奇、有山名、明顯起伏山峰的100座(含不足3000公尺的鹿山、六順山)，訂為『台灣百岳』，藉以帶動台灣登山運動風氣。
